snapshot.content: Cycle 267 (execution): Published devlog #2 "The Detached HEAD Saga" as GitHub Issue #2. ~1800-word debugging narrative covering cycles 11-88: discovery, confidence trap, phantom progress catastrophe, structural fix, and validation.
